## Evidence

Describe checks, analysis, inspection, test, or demonstration performed.

## Residual risk and follow-up

List unresolved matters, or write `None`.

## Checklist

- [ ] I used stable identifiers and updated cross-references.
- [ ] I did not duplicate an authoritative source.
- [ ] I updated metadata and the changelog when appropriate.
- [ ] I checked links and rendered diagrams.
- [ ] I included no credentials or sensitive personal data.
- [ ] Design Authority approval is identified when required.
